handlers.name: CommandMoveHandler
handlers.description: Handles minion movement commands. Allows the player to command a summoned minion to move to a specific tile.

functions.name: OnMinionSpawned
functions.description: Registers spawned minion with movement command. Stores minion reference at handler+0x20.

functions.name: OnMovementFinished
functions.description: Called when minion completes movement. Clears skill busy state and updates tile highlighter.

functions.name: OnUse
functions.signature: void OnUse(this, Actor owner, Tile targetTile)
functions.description: Commands minion to move to target tile using MoveToWithSkill with flags=5.

fields.name: skill
fields.description: Parent skill reference that owns this handler

fields.name: minionActor
fields.description: Reference to the controlled minion actor

handlers.name: CommandUseSkillHandler
handlers.description: Handles commanding minions to use skills. Allows the player to order a summoned minion to execute a specific skill at a target.

functions.name: IsHidden
functions.description: Returns true if minion is not usable (inverts IsUsable check).

functions.name: IsUsable
functions.description: Returns minion's alive status (byte at minion+0x48). False if minion is null.

functions.name: OnDeath
functions.description: Handles minion death - clears reference and schedules skill container update.

functions.name: OnMinionSpawned
functions.description: Registers minion and sets up skill/container references for coordination.

functions.name: OnMissionFinished
functions.description: Cleanup - clears minion ref and unsubscribes from TacticalManager.OnDeath event.

functions.name: OnMissionStarted
functions.description: Setup - clears minion ref and subscribes to TacticalManager.OnDeath event.

functions.name: OnUse
functions.signature: void OnUse(this, Actor owner, Tile targetTile)
functions.description: Creates skill from template at effectData+0x60, assigns minion as caster, calls Skill.Use with priority 3.

fields.name: skill
fields.description: Parent skill reference that owns this handler

fields.name: minionActor
fields.description: Reference to the controlled minion actor

SkillEventHandler.description: Base class for all skill effect handlers

functions.name: GetActor
functions.description: Returns actor using skill via skill->GetActor()

functions.name: GetEntity
functions.description: Returns entity using skill via skill->GetEntity()

CommandMove.note: Minimal configuration - movement behavior is hardcoded in handler

CommandUseSkill.description: ScriptableObject containing skill usage command configuration

fields.name: skillTemplate
fields.description: Template for the skill the minion will use

skill_class_fields_at_0x58_plus.description: Fields in the Skill class starting from offset 0x58

fields.name: aoeTiles
fields.description: Cached list of tiles affected by area-of-effect

fields.name: usableByPlayer
fields.description: Whether skill can be used by player (default true)

fields.name: hasChargeAbility
fields.description: Set true if any handler is ChargeHandler type

fields.name: apConsumer
fields.description: Actor that consumes AP (for minion/vehicle skills, overrides caster)

fields.name: skillUseId
fields.description: Unique ID assigned each time skill is used

key_discoveries.title: Minion Command Pattern
key_discoveries.description: Both CommandMoveHandler and CommandUseSkillHandler follow a consistent pattern: store minion reference at handler+0x20, effect data at handler+0x18, and parent skill at handler+0x10. This allows unified minion control.

key_discoveries.title: Minion Registration via OnMinionSpawned
key_discoveries.description: When a minion spawns, handlers receive OnMinionSpawned callback. CommandUseSkillHandler additionally sets skill+0x30 (caster) and skill+0xD0 (apConsumer) to enable proper skill targeting and AP deduction from the correct entity.

key_discoveries.title: Death Event Subscription
key_discoveries.description: CommandUseSkillHandler subscribes to TacticalManager.OnDeath during OnMissionStarted and unsubscribes during OnMissionFinished. This prevents stale handlers and ensures cleanup when minions die.

key_discoveries.title: Movement Uses MoveToWithSkill
key_discoveries.description: CommandMoveHandler uses Actor.MoveToWithSkill with flags=5 to move minions. The flag value likely indicates 'commanded movement' behavior (different from regular pathfinding).

key_discoveries.title: Skill Creation from Template
key_discoveries.description: CommandUseSkillHandler creates skills dynamically from SkillTemplate stored at effectData+0x60. The created skill's caster (skill+0x30) is set to the minion, enabling proper damage attribution.

key_discoveries.title: IsUsable Returns Minion Alive State
key_discoveries.description: CommandUseSkillHandler.IsUsable checks byte at minionActor+0x48 which is the IsAlive flag. Returns false if minion is null or dead.

key_discoveries.title: Skill Class Field 0x58 is AoE Tiles
key_discoveries.description: The Skill class stores a List<Tile> at offset 0x58 for caching area-of-effect tiles. This is initialized in the constructor and used during skill targeting and execution.

key_discoveries.title: Handler Event Flow
key_discoveries.description: Event sequence: OnMissionStarted -> OnMinionSpawned -> (multiple OnUse calls) -> OnMovementFinished/OnDeath -> OnMissionFinished. Each handler manages its lifecycle within this flow.

relevant_offsets.0xB0: int charges - Copied to Skill.charges in ctor
relevant_offsets.0xB4: int maxCharges - Copied to Skill.actionPointCost in ctor

vtable_offsets.description: Virtual method table offsets observed in decompilation
